description: What a connector must declare to the Connector Registry, and what it must produce.

must: translate source fields to canonical metric keys (metric-registry)
read an allow-list of fields — never forward PII

governance.auth_rule: session-bound sources (auth_basis=manual_export) must be fed by user export, never browser-session replay
governance.write_rule: connector output is written ONLY to the Integration Inbox (quarantine), never to production
